_doc: Mapa: Linear project -> workspace + repo + deploy target. Workspace: joi (Neo/AU/Fenix) or pisi (PISI). Deploy: gcp-vm via SSH. GPU platform (lambda-gpu) deferred — see platforms.lambda-gpu.

lambda-gpu.note: GPU VM platform for Ollama deploys via SSH, not a project. Separate from gcp-vm. Deferred until needed.

deploy.note: pilot test project — no deploy target

projects.note: Pilot test project for linear-agents orchestration. Team FEN (id 08722f3a-3bc3-4d91-a748-cb109348a231), Linear project id eecedf9f68d4. See docs/BUILD-BACKLOG Faza C / docs/STATE.md.
